name: AnimatedBackAndForthMovement
shortDescription: Horizontal back-and-forth movement with automatic flip. Requires GoLeft/TurnLeft animations.

eventsBasedBehaviors.description: Make the object go on the left, then when some distance is reached, flip and go back to the right. Make sure that your object has two animations called "GoLeft" and "TurnLeft".
eventsBasedBehaviors.name: AnimatedBackAndForthMirroredMovement

description: Make the object go on the left, then when some distance is reached, flip and go back to the right. **Make sure** that your object has **two animations called "GoLeft" and "TurnLeft"**.
